allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('STATUS:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('URL:', d.get\('url'\)\); print\('ITEMS_CHECK:'\); [print\(' ', c\) for c in d.get\('all_classes',[]\) if 's-result' in c or 'search-result' in c or 'sg-col' in c]; print\('PRICES:', d.get\('prices_found',[]\)\); print\('HTML snippet \(first 800\):'\); print\(d.get\('html_snippet',''\)[:800]\)")
